prompt: If bigger muscles can improve leverage through internal moment arms, could getting a big pump acutely boost strength the same way?
assertions: Acknowledges the mechanism is plausible in principle (pump increases muscle size, could alter leverage)
Explains that fatigue from pump work typically masks or outweighs any leverage benefit
Notes the effect would vary by muscle architecture and joint angle
Concludes don't count on pumps as a reliable strategy for immediate strength expression
